title: HyperWhisper Shared Models Catalog
description: Cross-platform source of truth for model metadata used by the Model Library on macOS, Windows, and iOS. Per-model fields that don't belong in any one platform's local registry (custom-vocabulary support, HyperWhisper Cloud routability, per-platform availability) live here so they're defined exactly once.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking field changes.

lastUpdated.description: Date the catalog was last edited (YYYY-MM-DD).

id.description: The upstream model identifier used by the provider's API (e.g. "nova-3-general", "claude-haiku-4-5"). Combined with `provider` to form a unique key — the same id string can appear under multiple providers (e.g. `gpt-oss-120b` exists under both Groq with the `openai/` prefix and Cerebras without it).

provider.description: Provider key. The transcription-only providers (deepgram, assemblyAI, elevenLabs, mistral, soniox, appleSpeech, localWhisper, parakeet, qwen3ASR, nemotron) and post-processing-only providers (anthropic, cerebras, localLLM) are disjoint; the rest (openai, groq, gemini, grok, hyperwhisper) appear in both roles, so use `kind` to disambiguate.

displayName.description: Optional human-readable name. Each platform may override; the catalog value is the default.

supportsCustomVocabulary.description: Whether this model accepts user-supplied keyword/keyterm/initial-prompt boosts at request time. Cross-checked against the provider's transcription request site, not vendor marketing.

availableViaHyperWhisperCloud.description: Whether this model is reachable through the credit-based HyperWhisper Cloud routing service (Fly backend forwards to the provider). When true, users without their own API key for that provider can still use it via cloud credits.

platforms.description: Platforms where this model is exposed in the Model Library. A model can sit in the catalog before any given app ships it — just omit that platform from the list and the app filters it out at load time.

supportedLanguages.description: Base ISO-639-1 language codes (region/script stripped, e.g. "en", "es", "zh") this CLOUD voice model can transcribe, used by the Model Library language filter. Omit when `supportsAllLanguages` is true. Only set on cloud (voice) models — local-model language sets live in each platform's code (Parakeet/Whisper registries), because the catalog's local rows are wildcards (`id: "*"`) that can't express per-model differences. The authoritative source is macOS `STTCapabilities.swift` (cloud models present there) or `shared-app-classification/cloud-stt-catalog.json` (Azure/Google); a macOS unit test asserts this field stays in sync.

isEnglishOnly.description: True when this cloud voice model transcribes English only (e.g. deepgram nova-3-medical). A convenience marker; `supportedLanguages` of ["en"] is equivalent for filtering.

supportsAllLanguages.description: True when this voice model is not language-limited for filtering — it passes every language filter. Set for models whose set covers all base languages (Whisper-family, Google Chirp) or that auto-detect with no closed list (Gemini, Grok). When true, `supportedLanguages` is omitted. This is a filtering convenience, NOT a user-facing guarantee of universal quality.

notes.description: Optional free-form note (deprecation, alias, etc). Not consumed by code.
